scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n client,server,model -c blue,green,yellow "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev" "python server_4b_api.py"
scripts.test: npm run test:client && npm run test:server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:client && npm run typecheck:server
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run audit:prod && npm run audit:all
